task_completion.description: Open the 'Facility Overview' dashboard in edit mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dashboard title 'Facility Overview' is visible at the top of the screen, and the UI shows dashboard editing controls (e.g., 'Add panel', 'Edit', or panel settings are visible).

task_completion.description: Add a new panel or edit an existing panel to hold the navigation links.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text, markdown, or navigation-specific panel is open in edit mode within the 'Facility Overview' dashboard.

task_completion.description: Add a navigation link to the 'HVAC Detail' dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text, a markdown link, or a button explicitly labeled 'HVAC Detail' is visible within the panel editor or the panel preview.

task_completion.description: Add a navigation link to the 'Lighting Detail' dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text, a markdown link, or a button explicitly labeled 'Lighting Detail' is visible within the panel editor or the panel preview.

task_completion.description: Add a navigation link to the 'Solar Detail' dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text, a markdown link, or a button explicitly labeled 'Solar Detail' is visible within the panel editor or the panel preview.

task_completion.description: Save the updated 'Facility Overview' dashboard with the new links visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Facility Overview' dashboard is saved (e.g., a 'Save' dialog was confirmed, or no unsaved changes indicator is present) and the three navigation links ('HVAC Detail', 'Lighting Detail', 'Solar Detail') are clearly visible on the main dashboard view.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the dashboard application's graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the web browser UI of the dashboard software (e.g., Grafana, Kibana) rather than using terminal commands or API scripts to modify the dashboard.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct landing dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: The title of the dashboard being edited is exactly 'Facility Overview', not a new dashboard or one of the detail dashboards.

integrity.description: The agent created actual dashboard elements rather than just typing text in an unrelated application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The links are created inside a legitimate dashboard panel (like a Text or Markdown panel) within the dashboard application, not in a separate text editor or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The landing dashboard that must be edited is exactly named 'Facility Overview'. The three target dashboards that must be linked are exactly named 'HVAC Detail', 'Lighting Detail', and 'Solar Detail'.
